name: retold-manager
description: Terminal UI and web UI manager for retold module repositories

brand.Name: Retold Manager
brand.Tagline: Status, update, ripple-publish across every Retold module
brand.Icon:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 96 96" width="96" height="96">
		<defs>
			<clipPath id="frame-retold-manager-filled-light">
				<path d="M 2 48
			C 2 18.0222416, 18.0222416 2, 48 2
			C 77.9777584 2, 94 18.0222416, 94 48
			C 94 77.9777584, 77.9777584 94, 48 94
			C 18.0222416 94, 2 77.9777584, 2 48 Z"/>
			</clipPath>
		</defs>
		<path d="M 2 48
			C 2 18.0222416, 18.0222416 2, 48 2
			C 77.9777584 2, 94 18.0222416, 94 48
			C 94 77.9777584, 77.9777584 94, 48 94
			C 18.0222416 94, 2 77.9777584, 2 48 Z" fill="#2f97b4"/>
		<g clip-path="url(#frame-retold-manager-filled-light)"><circle cx="48" cy="48" r="14" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)"/><path d="M 23.57 27.33 A 32 32 0 0 1 56.95 17.28" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M 78.11 37.18 A 32 32 0 0 1 70.13 71.11" fill="none" stroke="#e07e40" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M 42.31 79.49 A 32 32 0 0 1 16.92 55.61" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round"/></g>
		<text x="48" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"
			font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif"
			font-size="38" font-weight="600"
			fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-1">RM</text>
	</svg>
